name: garrettstimpson-agent
description: Security research agent — semantic RAG (Vectorize + bge embeddings) with BM25 fallback, KV-backed conversation memory, NVD + web search. Deploy to your own Cloudflare account in one click.

bindings.name: LLMS_URL
bindings.description: URL of your site llms.txt corpus (e.g. https://yoursite.com/llms.txt)

bindings.name: SITE_NAME
bindings.description: Display name shown in the agent chat UI

bindings.name: ACCESS_PASSWORD
bindings.description: Login password gating the whole agent (prompted at deploy). Setting this OR ACCESS_USER turns the login on; leave BOTH blank for open access. Note: a plain_text value is visible in the CF dashboard — for a true secret, leave blank and run `wrangler secret put ACCESS_PASSWORD`.

bindings.name: ACCESS_USER
bindings.description: Optional login username. NOTE: setting this alone turns the login on, but for real security also set ACCESS_PASSWORD.

bindings.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
bindings.description: Optional read-only GitHub PAT — enables github_osint code search (anonymous is impossible).

bindings.name: HIBP_API_KEY
bindings.description: Optional HaveIBeenPwned API key — enables HIBP results in breach_check (XposedOrNot works without it).

bindings.name: GOOGLE_CSE_KEY
bindings.description: Optional Google Programmable Search API key (with GOOGLE_CSE_CX) for reliable web_search.

bindings.name: GOOGLE_CSE_CX
bindings.description: Optional Google Programmable Search engine id (cx) — pair with GOOGLE_CSE_KEY.

bindings.name: BING_API_KEY
bindings.description: Optional Bing Web Search API key for reliable web_search.
